privileged_info_summary: The task uses Jitsi Meet stable-9753 running locally in Docker. The room_base_name is 'TrainingSession', which is used as the base name for dynamically generated rooms (appended with Unix timestamp to ensure uniqueness). All data is synthetic—fresh rooms are created for each task instance with no external datasets or personally identifiable information. The task verifies that the moderator can enable the 'Everyone follows me' setting via the Jitsi Meet UI.
